summary.en: Mobile advertising platform that finds the best-performing ad placements and reports.
summary.zh: 行動廣告平台，協助找出成效最佳的廣告版位並提供報告。

highlight.en: LeanMarket surfaces the highest-performing ad placements and uses in-depth reporting to help advertisers build an ideal campaign.
highlight.zh: LeanMarket 找出成效最高的廣告版位，並透過深入報告協助廣告主打造理想的廣告活動。

summary.en: Dead-simple, web-based statistical analysis software, like R or SPSS but easy to use.
summary.zh: 極為簡單的網頁版統計分析軟體，功能類似 R 或 SPSS，但更易上手。

highlight.en: Statwing replaces arcane statistics jargon with plain English, making analysis approachable for non-statisticians.
highlight.zh: Statwing 以淺白的日常語言取代艱澀的統計術語，讓非統計專業者也能輕鬆進行分析。

summary.en: A fun community for discovering and sharing images.
summary.zh: 一個有趣的圖片探索與分享社群。

highlight.en: Imgfave lets users collect favorite images and organize them into themed collections like humor, art, photography, fashion, and weddings.
highlight.zh: Imgfave 讓使用者收藏喜愛的圖片，並依幽默、藝術、攝影、時尚、婚禮等主題整理成合輯。

summary.en: Aerial videography company.
summary.zh: 空拍影像製作公司。

highlight.en: Arc focuses specifically on aerial videography, capturing footage from above for its clients.
highlight.zh: Arc 專注於空拍影像製作，從高空為客戶拍攝畫面。

summary.en: Automated mobile app testing across a large pool of Android and iOS devices.
summary.zh: 在大量 Android 與 iOS 裝置上自動化測試行動應用程式。

highlight.en: Testmunk provides full device and OS coverage on non-jailbroken phones, so teams need not constantly buy and upgrade test devices.
highlight.zh: Testmunk 在未越獄的手機上提供完整的裝置與作業系統覆蓋，讓團隊無需不斷購買與升級測試裝置。

summary.en: An API that makes video a first-class object for developers.
summary.zh: 讓影片成為開發者一級物件的影片 API。

highlight.en: Framebase lets developers add two lines of code to handle transcoding, device compatibility, and CDN delivery instead of building a video team.
highlight.zh: Framebase 讓開發者只需加入兩行程式碼，即可處理轉檔、裝置相容性與 CDN 派送，無需自建影片團隊。

summary.en: A marketplace for discovering and booking unique travel experiences worldwide.
summary.zh: 探索與預訂全球獨特旅遊體驗的市集平台。

highlight.en: Vayable connects travelers with independent companies and local experts offering one-of-a-kind activities, and lets anyone list trips.
highlight.zh: Vayable 讓旅客與提供獨特活動的獨立業者和在地專家連結，任何人也能上架行程。

summary.en: A marketing and analytics platform for eBooks.
summary.zh: 專為電子書打造的行銷與分析平台。

highlight.en: Hiptype's patent-pending plugin captures demographic and book performance data to power in-book targeted ads and automated marketing.
highlight.zh: Hiptype 的專利申請中外掛擷取人口統計與書籍成效資料，驅動書內精準廣告與自動化行銷。

summary.en: A collaborative social bookmarking service for professional networks.
summary.zh: 專為專業團隊打造的協作式社群書籤服務。

highlight.en: Kippt makes saved pages searchable, organizable, and readable across devices so colleagues can teach and share with each other.
highlight.zh: Kippt 讓收藏的頁面可搜尋、可整理並能跨裝置閱讀，方便同事彼此教學與分享。

summary.en: A visual design tool built specifically for the web.
summary.zh: 專為網頁打造的視覺設計工具。

highlight.en: Easel was created to close the gap between modern web development tools and design tools that hadn't kept pace as the web matured.
highlight.zh: Easel 旨在彌補現代網頁開發工具與未能與時俱進的設計工具之間的落差。

summary.en: A cross-platform personal content manager for the cloud era, a Finder for the cloud.
summary.zh: 專為雲端時代打造的跨平台個人內容管理工具，宛如雲端版的 Finder。

highlight.en: Collections unifies files from Dropbox, Google Drive, Facebook, Instagram, and local storage into a single web-age content manager.
highlight.zh: Collections 將 Dropbox、Google Drive、Facebook、Instagram 與本機檔案整合於單一的網路時代內容管理工具中。

summary.en: Simple 3D modeling software for 3D printers.
summary.zh: 專為 3D 印表機設計的簡易 3D 建模軟體。

highlight.en: Dreamforge bets that 3D printing will reshape our relationship with everyday products and builds modeling tools toward that vision.
highlight.zh: Dreamforge 認為 3D 列印將重塑人們與日常產品的關係，並依此願景打造建模工具。

summary.en: A tool to clip and share any video from any website.
summary.zh: 可剪輯並分享任何網站影片的工具。

highlight.en: ReelSurfer aims to build a content network from personal libraries of short, relevant videos that are saved, watched, and shared.
highlight.zh: ReelSurfer 旨在以使用者收藏、觀看與分享的短篇相關影片庫，建立一個內容網絡。

summary.en: Software marketplace connecting shippers directly with independent semi-truck owner-operators.
summary.zh: 將貨主直接對接獨立聯結車車主司機的軟體市集。

highlight.en: Keychain cuts out third-party brokers by tracking trucks' location and capacity in real time to match shipments with the right carrier.
highlight.zh: Keychain 即時追蹤卡車的位置與載運能力，為貨運媒合合適的承運者，省去傳統第三方物流仲介。

summary.en: A 401(k) provider that helps companies attract and retain talent.
summary.zh: 協助企業吸引與留住人才的 401(k) 退休金方案供應商。

highlight.en: OctaveWealth, operated by SEC-registered advisor Quillu Inc, builds tailored 401(k) plans designed to help employees grow their savings.
highlight.zh: OctaveWealth 由 SEC 註冊投資顧問 Quillu Inc 營運，打造量身訂製的 401(k) 方案，協助員工累積退休儲蓄。

summary.en: A network of automated self-service kiosks for convenient package delivery and pickup.
summary.zh: 為便利包裹收送打造的自助式自動取件櫃網絡。

highlight.en: BufferBox tackles undeliverable packages when recipients aren't home, using automated kiosks to cut carrier costs and ease pickup.
highlight.zh: BufferBox 以自動取件櫃解決收件人不在家導致無法投遞的問題，降低承運商成本並讓取件更便利。

summary.en: A phone system for businesses with transcription, call tracking, and CRM integration.
summary.zh: 為企業打造的電話系統，提供語音轉文字、通話追蹤與 CRM 整合。

highlight.en: Profig bundles transcriptions, call tracking, voice broadcasting, CRM integration, and custom features into one business phone system.
highlight.zh: Profig 將語音轉文字、通話追蹤、語音廣播、CRM 整合與客製功能整合於單一企業電話系統中。

summary.en: A voice messaging platform, acquired by Palantir in 2013.
summary.zh: 語音訊息平台，於 2013 年被 Palantir 收購。

highlight.en: VoiceGem built a voice messaging platform and was acquired by Palantir in 2013.
highlight.zh: VoiceGem 打造了一個語音訊息平台，並於 2013 年被 Palantir 收購。

summary.en: Dynamically scaling virtual machines offered as a service.
summary.zh: 以服務形式提供可動態擴展的虛擬機器。

highlight.en: GoScale offered virtual machines that scale dynamically on demand, delivered as a service.
highlight.zh: GoScale 以服務形式提供可依需求動態擴展的虛擬機器。

summary.en: Software that changes how companies review employee performance.
summary.zh: 改變企業績效考核方式的軟體。

highlight.en: MicroEval reimagines the dreaded annual review as a helpful, meaningful process that helps employees improve and grow their skills.
highlight.zh: MicroEval 將令人畏懼的年度考核重新設計為有助於員工提升與成長技能的有意義流程。

summary.en: A server-side stack that helps developers scale applications with easy concurrency.
summary.zh: 協助開發者輕鬆處理並行運算、擴展應用程式的伺服器端技術堆疊。

highlight.en: Parallel Universe's server-side stack makes concurrency programming simple, letting developers write multi-threaded code and ditch extra servers.
highlight.zh: Parallel Universe 的伺服器端技術讓並行程式設計變得簡單，使開發者能撰寫多執行緒程式並省去多餘的伺服器。

summary.en: Simple, inexpensive bike sharing systems that can be deployed almost anywhere.
summary.zh: 簡單、平價的自行車共享系統，幾乎可在任何地方部署。

highlight.en: viaCycle's bike sharing technology can stand up a program anywhere in days rather than months, bringing affordable transport where it's needed most.
highlight.zh: viaCycle 的自行車共享技術能在數天而非數月內於任何地點建置系統，將平價交通帶到最需要的地方。

summary.en: A curated community connecting customers with top mobile designers.
summary.zh: 連結客戶與頂尖行動裝置設計師的精選社群。

highlight.en: Scoutzie is an exclusive, portfolio-vetted community where members are admitted solely on the merits of their work.
highlight.zh: Scoutzie 是經作品集審核的封閉社群，成員僅憑作品實力獲准加入。

summary.en: Mass-customized active apparel with a home try-on program for the perfect fit.
summary.zh: 大規模客製化的機能服飾，提供居家試穿方案以找到完美合身的版型。

highlight.en: Vastrm solves ill-fitting shirts by letting customers make custom fit adjustments and try on apparel at home to dial in their unique body type.
highlight.zh: Vastrm 透過讓顧客客製合身調整並在家試穿，解決襯衫不合身的問題，找到符合個人體型的版型。

summary.en: A publishing platform designed to work the way your brain does.
summary.zh: 依照人腦思考方式設計的發布平台。

highlight.en: Svbtle is a minimalist writing and publishing platform built to mirror the natural flow of how ideas form in your head.
highlight.zh: Svbtle 是一個極簡的寫作與發布平台，旨在貼合想法在腦中自然成形的流程。

summary.en: A global online health-tracking network for Crohn's and ulcerative colitis patients.
summary.zh: 專為克隆氏症與潰瘍性結腸炎患者打造的全球線上健康追蹤網絡。

highlight.en: Crohnology connects over 27,000 patients to track symptoms and has run research collaborations with UNC, the CCFA, and Genentech.
highlight.zh: Crohnology 連結逾 27,000 名患者追蹤症狀，並曾與北卡羅來納大學、CCFA 及 Genentech 等機構進行研究合作。

summary.en: BrainTripping is a consumer product company.
summary.zh: BrainTripping 是一家消費性產品公司。

highlight.en: BrainTripping is a Summer 2012 YC consumer startup operating globally.
highlight.zh: BrainTripping 是 2012 年夏季 YC 的消費性產品新創公司，業務遍及全球。

summary.en: A personalized news reader that brings people together to discuss the world.
summary.zh: 讓人們聚在一起討論世界大事的個人化新聞閱讀器。

highlight.en: NewsBlur combines a personalized RSS-style feed with social discussion, described as a new sound of an old instrument.
highlight.zh: NewsBlur 結合個人化的 RSS 式新聞流與社群討論，被形容為以舊樂器奏出的新聲音。

summary.en: Airshared is a consumer startup from YC Summer 2012.
summary.zh: Airshared 是 2012 年夏季 YC 的消費性產品新創公司。

highlight.en: Airshared is a Summer 2012 Y Combinator consumer company with a globally focused product.
highlight.zh: Airshared 是 2012 年夏季 Y Combinator 的消費性產品公司，產品面向全球市場。

summary.en: Grid is a consumer startup from YC Summer 2012.
summary.zh: Grid 是 2012 年夏季 YC 的消費性產品新創公司。

highlight.en: Grid is a Summer 2012 Y Combinator consumer company based in the US.
highlight.zh: Grid 是 2012 年夏季 Y Combinator 的消費性產品公司，總部位於美國。

summary.en: Insurance billing APIs for healthcare businesses.
summary.zh: 為醫療業者打造的保險帳務 API。

highlight.en: Eligible bills itself as the nation's first insurance billing platform built for builders, giving startups enterprise scale and big firms startup agility.
highlight.zh: Eligible 自稱是全美首個專為開發者打造的保險帳務平台，讓新創擁有企業級規模、讓大公司具備新創般的靈活。

summary.en: The best way for artists to release new music and videos.
summary.zh: 讓音樂人發布新音樂與影片的最佳途徑。

highlight.en: Hipset is built specifically to help artists release their new music and videos.
highlight.zh: Hipset 專為協助音樂人發布新音樂與影片而打造。

summary.en: A tactile gaming controller for mobile phones.
summary.zh: 為手機打造的觸覺式遊戲控制器。

highlight.en: Coco Controller adds a physical, tactile control surface to mobile phones for gaming.
highlight.zh: Coco Controller 為手機遊戲增添實體觸覺操控介面。

summary.en: Attribution metatags for online content.
summary.zh: 為線上內容提供來源標註的中介標籤。

highlight.en: Credictive provides attribution metatags so online content can be properly credited to its source.
highlight.zh: Credictive 提供來源標註中介標籤，讓線上內容能正確歸功於原始出處。

summary.en: A mobile calendar for all the fun stuff you do with friends.
summary.zh: 記錄你與朋友各種趣味活動的行動行事曆。

highlight.en: Assorted Bits is a mobile calendar focused on the social, fun activities you do together with friends.
highlight.zh: Assorted Bits 是一款專注於你與朋友共同進行的趣味社交活動的行動行事曆。

summary.en: A platform for building and operating time series applications.
summary.zh: 用於建構與營運時序型應用程式的平台。

highlight.en: InfluxData, creator of open-source InfluxDB, powers monitoring, analytics, and IoT apps for customers like Cisco, eBay, and Autodesk.
highlight.zh: InfluxData 是開源 InfluxDB 的開發者，為 Cisco、eBay、Autodesk 等客戶驅動監控、分析與物聯網應用。

summary.en: A platform empowering restaurants and small food makers to ship nationwide.
summary.zh: 讓餐廳與小型食品商家能全國配送的平台。

highlight.en: Goldbelly discovers America's most unique handmade and regional foods and ships them to your door anywhere in the country.
highlight.zh: Goldbelly 發掘全美最獨特的手工與地方美食，並將其配送到全國各地的家門口。

summary.en: RF sensing technology to automate and transform in-store retail processes.
summary.zh: 以射頻感測技術自動化並革新店內零售流程。

highlight.en: RADAR's RF sensing enables automated inventory counts, line-free autonomous checkout, and measurement of every customer-product interaction.
highlight.zh: RADAR 的射頻感測技術可自動盤點庫存、實現無排隊的自主結帳，並衡量每一次顧客與商品的互動。

summary.en: A better way to remodel, connecting homeowners with reliable general contractors.
summary.zh: 更聰明的裝修方式，為屋主媒合可靠的承包商。

highlight.en: BuildZoom mines public data on every licensed US contractor, including permits and insurance, to rank quality and source competitive bids.
highlight.zh: BuildZoom 挖掘全美每位持牌承包商的公開資料（含建照與保險），評比品質並協助取得具競爭力的報價。

summary.en: The easiest way to create a beautiful, mobile-optimized website.
summary.zh: 打造美觀、行動裝置最佳化網站的最簡單方式。

highlight.en: Strikingly lets anyone build a professional website in under 30 minutes with no code or design skills, looking great on phone, tablet, and computer.
highlight.zh: Strikingly 讓任何人無需程式或設計技能，30 分鐘內就能建好專業網站，在手機、平板與電腦上都好看。

summary.en: A tool for building more beautiful, fun alternatives to traditional documents.
summary.zh: 打造比傳統文件更美觀、更有趣替代品的工具。

highlight.en: Used by over ten million people, Padlet offers visual timelines and maps and is many children's first experience creating things on the internet.
highlight.zh: Padlet 擁有逾千萬使用者，提供視覺化時間軸與地圖，並是許多孩子在網路上創作的初體驗。

summary.en: The Airbnb of car rentals at airports, renting out travelers' parked cars.
summary.zh: 機場版的 Airbnb 租車，出租旅客停放的車輛。

highlight.en: FlightCar connected airport travelers needing cars with locals parking theirs, raising $40.41M from investors including Airbnb's Brian Chesky.
highlight.zh: FlightCar 為機場需要租車的旅客媒合停車的當地車主，募得 4,041 萬美元，投資者包括 Airbnb 的 Brian Chesky。

summary.en: End-to-end commercial drone solutions for enterprises.
summary.zh: 為企業打造的端到端商用無人機解決方案。

highlight.en: Airware combines hardware, software, and cloud services so enterprises can safely operate commercial drones at scale and use aerial data.
highlight.zh: Airware 結合硬體、軟體與雲端服務，讓企業能安全地大規模操作商用無人機並運用空拍資料。

summary.en: Selling health insurance to small businesses 100% online.
summary.zh: 100% 線上為小型企業銷售健康保險。

highlight.en: SimplyInsured was founded to eliminate fear from health insurance, transforming a $20 billion small-business market with a fully online platform.
highlight.zh: SimplyInsured 以消除人們對健康保險的恐懼為使命，以全線上平台改造規模達 200 億美元的小型企業市場。

summary.en: Robinhood for pre-IPO startups, letting anyone invest as little as $100.
summary.zh: 上市前新創版的 Robinhood，讓任何人最低投資 100 美元。

highlight.en: Enabled by the JOBS Act, Wefunder lets everyone, not just the wealthy, invest in startups they care about and become passionate backers.
highlight.zh: 在 JOBS 法案的支持下，Wefunder 讓每個人（而非僅限富人）都能投資自己關心的新創，成為熱情的支持者。

summary.en: A data and AI platform for ecommerce and cross-border logistics.
summary.zh: 為電商與跨境物流打造的資料與 AI 平台。

highlight.en: Semantics3 offers data feeds, AI APIs, and dashboards for marketplaces, logistics, and brands, covering catalog enrichment, matching, and price monitoring.
highlight.zh: Semantics3 為市集、物流與品牌提供資料饋送、AI API 與儀表板，涵蓋目錄擴充、商品比對與價格監控。

summary.en: Workflow and collaboration software for hospitals.
summary.zh: 為醫院打造的工作流程與協作軟體。

highlight.en: Medisas aims to simplify convoluted hospital software so doctors and nurses spend less time clicking and more time with patients.
highlight.zh: Medisas 致力簡化繁複的醫院軟體，讓醫護人員少花時間點擊系統、多花時間照護病患。

summary.en: An ETL solution for creating perfect data pipelines from day one.
summary.zh: 從第一天就能打造完美資料管線的 ETL 解決方案。

highlight.en: Etleap automates most ETL setup and maintenance and reduces the rest to 10-minute tasks that analysts can own, without heavy engineering.
highlight.zh: Etleap 自動化大部分 ETL 的建置與維運，並將其餘工作簡化為分析師可自行完成的 10 分鐘任務，無需大量工程投入。

summary.en: Online auctions for authenticated, pre-owned women's designer goods.
summary.zh: 經正品鑑定的二手女裝設計師精品線上拍賣。

highlight.en: Lollipuff pre-screens every item for authenticity, so buyers avoid counterfeits and sellers list luxury pieces with confidence.
highlight.zh: Lollipuff 對每件商品進行正品預審，讓買家避開仿冒品，賣家也能安心刊登精品。

summary.en: A mobile wallet device that consolidates your cards and pays where credit cards are accepted.
summary.zh: 整合多張卡片、可在接受信用卡處付款的行動錢包裝置。

highlight.en: Coin's credit-card-sized device holds your credit, debit, gift, and loyalty cards in one and offered a developer program for wearables makers.
highlight.zh: Coin 信用卡大小的裝置可將信用卡、簽帳卡、禮品卡與會員卡整合於一張，並提供穿戴裝置廠商的開發者方案。

summary.en: Changing divorce for good by making it far less horrible for families.
summary.zh: 徹底改變離婚過程，讓家庭少受煎熬。

highlight.en: Instead of each spouse lawyering up, Wevorce brings couples together with a trained attorney-mediator to keep costs down and put kids first.
highlight.zh: Wevorce 不讓夫妻各自找律師對抗，而是由受訓的律師調解員帶領雙方協商，控制費用並以孩子為優先。

summary.en: The first global crowdfunding platform for medical treatments.
summary.zh: 全球首個醫療治療的群眾募資平台。

highlight.en: Watsi builds technology to finance universal healthcare by crowdfunding surgeries and providing coverage for primary care.
highlight.zh: Watsi 打造技術，透過群眾募資資助手術並提供基礎照護保障，以推動全民健保。

summary.en: Daily, weather-appropriate outfit advice tailored to your life and style.
summary.zh: 依天氣、生活與風格量身打造的每日穿搭建議。

highlight.en: StyleUp delivers personalized outfit recommendations daily and learns from your feedback to refine its suggestions over time.
highlight.zh: StyleUp 每日提供個人化穿搭建議，並從你的回饋中學習，逐步優化推薦。

summary.en: Harnessing the wisdom of crowds to solve difficult medical cases.
summary.zh: 借助群眾智慧來解開疑難雜症病例。

highlight.en: CrowdMed crowdsources difficult diagnoses to cut healthcare costs and is backed by NEA, Andreessen Horowitz, and Greylock, among others.
highlight.zh: CrowdMed 以群眾外包方式解決疑難診斷以降低醫療成本，獲 NEA、Andreessen Horowitz 與 Greylock 等機構投資。

summary.en: An online circuit simulator and electronic schematic editor.
summary.zh: 線上電路模擬器與電子電路圖編輯器。

highlight.en: CircuitLab makes it easier for engineers, students, and hobbyists to design, analyze, build, and share electronic circuits in the browser.
highlight.zh: CircuitLab 讓工程師、學生與電子愛好者能更輕鬆地在瀏覽器中設計、分析、製作並分享電子電路。

summary.en: Collaborative screen sharing where each person gets their own mouse pointer.
summary.zh: 協作式螢幕共享，每個人都有自己的滑鼠游標。

highlight.en: Screenhero lets two people share any application and both stay in control with separate cursors, like Google Docs for any desktop app.
highlight.zh: Screenhero 讓兩人共享任何應用程式，各自擁有獨立游標並同時操控，宛如可用於任何桌面程式的 Google Docs。

summary.en: Kickstarter for physical products, with exclusive product launches to shop.
summary.zh: 實體產品版的 Kickstarter，提供獨家產品首發選購。

highlight.en: Swish lets shoppers browse and buy exclusive product launches in a crowdfunding-style marketplace for physical goods.
highlight.zh: Swish 讓消費者在實體商品的群眾募資式市集中瀏覽並選購獨家首發產品。

summary.en: Simple, modern invoicing software.
summary.zh: 簡單、現代的開立發票軟體。

highlight.en: PayTango replaces spreadsheets and bulky invoicing software, letting users quickly create beautiful PDF invoices and send them from anywhere.
highlight.zh: PayTango 取代試算表與笨重的開票軟體，讓使用者快速製作精美的 PDF 發票並隨處寄送。

summary.en: An online tool for teachers to create, administer, and manage tests, eliminating paper exams.
summary.zh: 讓教師線上出題、施測與管理考試的工具，淘汰紙本測驗。

highlight.en: Terascore's browser-based WYSIWYG authoring lets teachers build tests with images and video, with instant scores and analytics on question quality.
highlight.zh: Terascore 的瀏覽器所見即所得編輯器讓教師加入圖片與影片出題，並即時取得成績與試題品質分析。

summary.en: The fastest, easiest, and most affordable option for small business owners.
summary.zh: 為小型企業主打造最快、最簡單且最實惠的方案。

highlight.en: Cheetah is a Winter 2013 YC B2B startup positioning itself as the fastest, easiest, and most affordable choice for small business owners.
highlight.zh: Cheetah 是 2013 年冬季 YC 的 B2B 新創，定位為小型企業主最快、最簡單且最實惠的選擇。

summary.en: Simple password and identity management for teams, acquired by LogMeIn.
summary.zh: 為團隊打造的簡易密碼與身分管理工具，被 LogMeIn 收購。

highlight.en: Meldium is a central dashboard that connects to every cloud app to create, edit, and remove user accounts and passwords, all without IT.
highlight.zh: Meldium 是一個連結各雲端應用的集中儀表板，可建立、編輯與移除使用者帳號與密碼，全程無需 IT 介入。

summary.en: A big data music analytics platform for evaluating artists and social signals.
summary.zh: 用於評估歌手與社群訊號的大數據音樂分析平台。

highlight.en: BeatDeck evaluates an artist's KPM and social signals, providing an extensive dashboard into the music industry.
highlight.zh: BeatDeck 評估歌手的 KPM 與社群訊號，提供深入音樂產業的完整儀表板。

summary.en: Ship packages to Swapbox kiosks and pick them up to avoid missed deliveries.
summary.zh: 將包裹寄到 Swapbox 取件櫃並自行取貨，避免錯過配送。

highlight.en: Swapbox kiosks let users receive packages without missed-delivery notices and drop off unpackaged items to ship via UPS, USPS, or FedEx.
highlight.zh: Swapbox 取件櫃讓使用者免於錯過配送通知，並可投遞未包裝的物品，透過 UPS、USPS 或 FedEx 寄出。

summary.en: Cloud-based management of medical images like X-rays, CT scans, and MRIs.
summary.zh: 以雲端管理 X 光、電腦斷層與磁振造影等醫療影像。

highlight.en: MedXT lets medical professionals securely access and share imaging with specialty RIS, PACS, and HL7 connectivity to power radiology operations.
highlight.zh: MedXT 讓醫療專業人員安全地存取與分享影像，並以 RIS、PACS 與 HL7 連接驅動放射科運作。

summary.en: Ultra-short customer feedback surveys on tablets mounted in businesses.
summary.zh: 在商家內安裝平板進行極短的顧客意見調查。

highlight.en: Posmetrics's iPad-based surveys collect far more feedback data and deliver real-time, actionable recommendations to improve services.
highlight.zh: Posmetrics 的 iPad 問卷收集遠多於其他方式的回饋資料，並提供即時、可執行的建議以改善服務。

summary.en: Predicting workplace performance through neuroscience.
summary.zh: 透過神經科學預測職場表現。

highlight.en: Prophecy's cognitive tests combine behavioral measures with biosignal sensors to predict aptitude, personality, and job performance.
highlight.zh: Prophecy 的認知測驗結合行為量測與生物訊號感測器，預測能力、性格與工作表現。

summary.en: A crowdfunding platform for science.
summary.zh: 專為科學研究打造的群眾募資平台。

highlight.en: Over 47,000 backers have pledged $9 million to 900 science projects on Experiment, with researchers from Stanford, Harvard, and Yale taking part.
highlight.zh: 逾 47,000 名支持者已在 Experiment 上為 900 個科學專案承諾 900 萬美元，史丹佛、哈佛與耶魯的研究者皆參與其中。

summary.en: The easiest way to prototype web applications.
summary.zh: 原型製作網頁應用程式的最簡單方式。

highlight.en: Appcubator lets users create web applications with drag-and-drop, text inserts, and custom themes, skipping the arduous coding process.
highlight.zh: Appcubator 讓使用者以拖放、文字插入與自訂主題建立網頁應用程式，省去繁瑣的程式撰寫過程。

summary.en: Virtual paralegal services for law firms, connecting people with lawyers quickly.
summary.zh: 為律師事務所提供虛擬法務助理服務，並快速為民眾媒合律師。

highlight.en: Lawdingo gives people direct access to independent lawyers who tend to offer flexible hours, lower rates, and stronger customer service.
highlight.zh: Lawdingo 讓民眾直接接觸獨立律師，這些律師通常時間更彈性、收費更低且更重視客戶服務。

summary.en: A universal urban transit app that finds the best route across all transport options.
summary.zh: 整合各種交通選項、找出最佳路線的城市通用大眾運輸 App。

highlight.en: Rover uses real-time MUNI, BART, and Caltrain data in the SF Bay Area to give the best route right now, so you don't miss connections.
highlight.zh: Rover 運用舊金山灣區 MUNI、BART 與 Caltrain 的即時資料，提供當下最佳路線，讓你不會錯過轉乘。

summary.en: Electronics and development tools that speed up product development.
summary.zh: 加速產品開發的電子元件與開發工具。

highlight.en: Logiblock is the client services arm of Outbreak, Inc, making electronic product development faster for both startups and established firms.
highlight.zh: Logiblock 是 Outbreak, Inc. 的客戶服務部門，為新創與成熟企業加速電子產品開發。

summary.en: Improving education for every student.
summary.zh: 為每位學生改善教育。

highlight.en: Panorama's research-backed platform serves 15 million K-12 students, boosting achievement, attendance, behavior, and graduation readiness.
highlight.zh: Panorama 以研究為基礎的平台服務 1,500 萬名 K-12 學生，提升學業成就、出席率、行為與畢業準備度。

summary.en: A subscription service for women's apparel and accessories.
summary.zh: 女裝與配件的訂閱制服務。

highlight.en: Le Tote's data-driven personalization engine, powered by over 2 billion customer data points, gives women an unlimited rotating closet.
highlight.zh: Le Tote 以超過 20 億筆顧客資料驅動的個人化引擎，為女性提供可無限輪換的衣櫥。

summary.en: An automation platform that transforms direct mail into a programmable channel.
summary.zh: 將直郵轉化為可程式化通路的自動化平台。

highlight.en: Lob's APIs let enterprises mail dynamic, personalized print media with piece-by-piece tracing across its redundant Print Delivery Network.
highlight.zh: Lob 的 API 讓企業能寄送動態、個人化的印刷品，並透過其備援的列印派送網絡逐件追蹤。

summary.en: Financial services for financial caregivers and the people they support.
summary.zh: 為財務照護者及其照顧對象提供金融服務。

highlight.en: True Link builds financial solutions for vulnerable elders, people with disabilities, and people in recovery, and their families and caregivers.
highlight.zh: True Link 為弱勢長者、身心障礙者與康復者，以及他們的家人與照護者，打造金融解決方案。

summary.en: The shipping infrastructure of the internet, a missing API for shipping.
summary.zh: 網際網路的物流基礎建設，補足缺失的寄件 API。

highlight.en: EasyPost lets retailers integrate once to add carriers, generate labels, track packages in near real-time, and insure shipments.
highlight.zh: EasyPost 讓零售商一次整合即可新增承運商、產生運送標籤、近即時追蹤包裹並為貨件投保。

summary.en: The all-in-one platform for subscription box businesses.
summary.zh: 訂閱盒事業的一站式平台。

highlight.en: Cratejoy lets companies launch and scale subscription boxes with no coding, supporting 2,500+ companies and over a million marketplace subscribers.
highlight.zh: Cratejoy 讓企業無需寫程式即可推出並擴展訂閱盒業務，已支援逾 2,500 家公司與超過百萬名市集訂閱者。

summary.en: A platform that lets mobile teams innovate faster to create amazing user experiences.
summary.zh: 讓行動團隊更快創新、打造絕佳使用者體驗的平台。

highlight.en: Apptimize powers A/B testing, instant updates, and segmented rollouts for top apps like The Wall Street Journal, Vevo, and Strava.
highlight.zh: Apptimize 為《華爾街日報》、Vevo 與 Strava 等頂尖 App 提供 A/B 測試、即時更新與分眾推送功能。

summary.en: Making the world's laws free and understandable with AI legal research.
summary.zh: 以 AI 法律研究讓世界各地的法律免費且易懂。

highlight.en: Casetext's CARA A.I. contextual search, built by ex-litigators and data scientists, helps researchers find on-point case authorities faster.
highlight.zh: Casetext 的 CARA A.I. 情境式搜尋由前訴訟律師與資料科學家打造，協助研究者更快找到切題的判例依據。

summary.en: A location intelligence platform that makes physical spaces programmable.
summary.zh: 讓實體空間可程式化的位置智慧平台。

highlight.en: Estimote's SpaceTimeOS uses Bluetooth and Ultra Wideband sensors to create a cloud digital twin for inch-precise, real-time asset tracking.
highlight.zh: Estimote 的 SpaceTimeOS 運用藍牙與超寬頻感測器建立雲端數位分身，實現精確至英吋的即時資產追蹤。

summary.en: Simple wireless controls for Sonos, Philips Hue, and other smart home products.
summary.zh: 為 Sonos、Philips Hue 及其他智慧家庭產品打造的簡易無線控制器。

highlight.en: Senic offers wireless switches and remotes plus software that simplifies smart home installation to set the right sound and light for any moment.
highlight.zh: Senic 提供無線開關與遙控器，並以軟體簡化智慧家庭安裝，讓每個時刻都有合適的聲音與燈光氛圍。

summary.en: An on-demand emotional support service matching people with trained listeners.
summary.zh: 隨需的情緒支持服務，為人們媒合受訓的傾聽者。

highlight.en: 7 Cups anonymously connects people to compassionate, trained listeners who simply listen without judging or trying to solve problems.
highlight.zh: 7 Cups 匿名地將人們連結到富同理心、受過訓練的傾聽者，他們只是傾聽，不評判也不急著解決問題。

summary.en: Mobile ads that users like, acquired by Pinterest in May 2016.
summary.zh: 使用者願意接受的行動廣告，於 2016 年 5 月被 Pinterest 收購。

highlight.en: URX helped publishers monetize mobile content and connect users to relevant commerce, raising $15M before its 2016 Pinterest acquisition.
highlight.zh: URX 協助發布商將行動內容變現並將使用者導向相關商務，募得 1,500 萬美元，並於 2016 年被 Pinterest 收購。

summary.en: A dashboard for companies to manage immigration for their employees.
summary.zh: 讓企業管理員工移民事務的儀表板。

highlight.en: Teleborder helps companies hire and retain international employees by managing immigration, reporting, and compliance through one platform.
highlight.zh: Teleborder 透過單一平台管理移民、申報與法遵事務，協助企業聘用並留住國際員工。

summary.en: Uber for flowers, on-demand floral delivery.
summary.zh: 花卉版的 Uber，隨需鮮花配送。

highlight.en: BloomThat curates and designs on-demand blooms starting at $38, with same-day delivery in SF, the Bay Area, NYC, and LA, plus nationwide next-day.
highlight.zh: BloomThat 精選並設計隨需花束，38 美元起，於舊金山、灣區、紐約與洛杉磯當日送達，全美則次日送達。

summary.en: Replacing resume screening with code challenges.
summary.zh: 以程式挑戰取代履歷篩選。

highlight.en: Hackermeter evaluates engineering candidates through code challenges instead of relying on traditional resume screening.
highlight.zh: Hackermeter 透過程式挑戰評估工程人才，取代傳統的履歷篩選方式。

summary.en: A Bitcoin marketplace and high-volume digital trading engine.
summary.zh: 比特幣交易市集與高頻數位交易引擎。

highlight.en: Buttercoin is an open-source, high-volume digital trading engine used to arrange Bitcoin trades in an order book.
highlight.zh: Buttercoin 是一個開源的高頻數位交易引擎，用於在訂單簿中撮合比特幣交易。

summary.en: A chat program that integrates with email and shows presence.
summary.zh: 整合電子郵件並顯示在線狀態的聊天程式。

highlight.en: Hum organizes conversation into threads with presence, lets you drop work requests into feeds, and aims to transition users away from email.
highlight.zh: Hum 將對話整理成顯示在線狀態的討論串，可將工作請求丟入彼此的動態，目標是讓使用者逐步擺脫電子郵件。

summary.en: Augmented reality glasses for a total AR computing experience.
summary.zh: 提供完整擴增實境運算體驗的 AR 眼鏡。

highlight.en: Meta's AR glasses let users see and interact with virtual objects via hand gestures, aiming to replace desktops, laptops, tablets, and phones.
highlight.zh: Meta 的 AR 眼鏡讓使用者以手勢檢視並操作虛擬物件，目標是取代桌機、筆電、平板與智慧型手機。

summary.en: A flyer app for browsing and distributing local flyers.
summary.zh: 用於瀏覽與派送在地傳單的傳單 App。

highlight.en: Reebee lets Canadian shoppers browse local flyers with an integrated shopping list, while offering retailers targeted, measurable digital distribution.
highlight.zh: Reebee 讓加拿大消費者瀏覽在地傳單並附帶整合購物清單，同時為零售商提供精準、可量化的數位派送。
